name: chatdapp-with-ens-ipfs-gasless
description: Fully offline decentralized chat DApp - local Hardhat, MetaMask, base64 avatars

scripts.dev: concurrently -n relayer,frontend -c blue,green "npm run relayer" "npm run frontend"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -s first "npm run node" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:8545 && npm run setup && npm run dev"
